description: Update the birthday party RSVP tracker with guest responses. Generate summary statistics for the guest list and apply conditional formatting for visual priority management. Save the updated spreadsheet to /home/ga/Documents/birthday_rsvp_tracker.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: Update the birthday party RSVP tracker: Mark Jake's family as attending (Yes, 2 adults, 1 kid) and Sarah's family as not attending (No). Then create formulas to calculate total adults, total kids, and pending responses. Apply conditional formatting to highlight RSVP statuses.
